<?php namespace Cviebrock\EloquentSluggable\Tests\Models; /** * Class PostWithIdSource. * * A test model that uses the model's ID in the slug source. */ class PostWithIdSource extends Post { /** * Return the sluggable configuration array for this model. */ public function sluggable(): array { return [ 'slug' => [ 'source' => ['title', 'id'], 'onUpdate' => true, ], ]; } }
